Inmate Thomas ADC#199876 refusing to exit cell in 12 Barracks
~7:15am
Thomas barricaded door with mattress, wouldn't respond to orders
Lt Roberts authorized forced cell movement 7:20am
Sgt Peterman gave 4 direct orders to come out — Thomas refused, said "I'll kill any officer that steps in here"
5-man team assembled: Sgt Peterman, Cpl Powell, Cpl Sohns, Cpl Torres, Cpl Miller
Door breached, Thomas rushed team, swung fist at Cpl Torres — missed
Thomas taken to ground, cuffed by Cpl Powell
Sgt Peterman video recorded entire extraction on handheld camera
Cpl Torres placed leg restraints
Thomas escorted to Restrictive Housing by Cpl Powell & Cpl Sohns
No injuries to staff or inmate
Thomas refused medical
Shift Capt Davis notified 7:30am
Photos taken of barricaded cell
